calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-04-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Nuris, via Zoom, for Samantha Holsapple, Petitioner.

The court reminds counsel of its obligation to follow legislature and points counsel to the principal issue of the estate funds not being adequately insured, consistent with FDIC limits, and that a hearing should never have been required to address the issue. Counsel offers testimony as to the court's concerns and advises that there was never an intention to ignore the court's directives.

After additional discussion, the Petition is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Sarmiento. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-28-2022 Continued To Apr-27-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Apr-14-2021 Granted Per Written Order
